updates.tweet_text:
Low volatility summer trading in #ES_F where we apply the same protocol daily. Friday's support was 7555, held exact. 3 targets given were 7597, 7611, 7624, all hit

Plan: 0 to do until vol spike, ride runner. 7612, 7621, 7627 next. 7570 (watch traps), 7553 (watch traps)=supports https://t.co/p5oRa1wkXh
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7553, 7570, 7612, 7627) are morning-plan reaffirmations; 7621 is close to 7627 but context is a directional list restatement, not a new named actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: @RockyTSST Nothing I would engage there. As I said in newsletter: "As of writing 7596 is first support down. I’ve got no interest in engaging here and this is far too close to the highs." I only take high quality, 95-100% win rate Failed Breakdowns.
updates.notes: 7596 is in morning plan; tweet is a hindsight reaffirmation of newsletter text, no new actionable level named.

updates.tweet_text: @kaly11681776 When we get volatility back. There's no volatility now and day traders can't trade no volatility (you can, but you'll get chopped up and lose).
updates.notes: Pure commentary on market conditions (no volatility). No price levels named or implied whatsoever.

updates.tweet_text:
Just ride runner, summer trading is 90-95% riding runners, then 5% of the time we get a vol spike which produces a Failed Breakdown and gets us long for the next 1-3 days. Rinse and repeat. 

No change: 7612, 7621, 7627 next slate. No support until 7570 (watch traps), 7553 (same) https://t.co/lYyVu21Sq1
updates.notes: 7621 not in morning plan but tweet says 'No change' — reaffirmation framing. All other prices (7612,7627,7570,7553) are morning-plan levels. No new actionable levels.

updates.tweet_text:
Mostly untradable summer chop still in #ES_F. Summer trading=95% riding a runner, 5% engaging the brief vol spikes on Failed Breakdowns. Do not overtrade in this action.

7570 (watch traps) remains support, with 7553 (watch traps) below. 7612, 7621, 7627 next slate https://t.co/JJt2MMC0ey
updates.notes: 7570, 7553, 7612, 7627 all in morning plan; 7621 appears as observation in a directional list, no explicit actionable naming language for a new level.

updates.tweet_text:
We are still in peak low volatility summer chop in #ES_F and this is not remotely tradable and I don't touch it. Just hold runner as we grind. 7612, 7621, 7627 next up from here.

7570, 7553 are supports if we actually get volatility. Watch traps of both of them https://t.co/59thmb9X35
updates.notes: 7621 is named as 'next up' target not in morning plan; 7612/7627/7570/7553 are all existing plan levels reaffirmed.

updates.tweet_text: Nice mini volatility spike in #ES_F but in summer trading its important to aggressively take profits if they are there. 7570 first support of interest down today and we just flushed the zone (overnight low) and popped above. Bulls need to push fast now to see 7578, 7587, 7596 https://t.co/NS43NKiA8s
updates.notes: 7578 and 7587 are newly named upside targets not in morning plan; 7596 and 7570 are already published levels.

updates.tweet_text: @DeFiBaller They become more likely because the more red in ES, the larger the subsequent green move will be.
updates.notes: Pure conceptual commentary about market dynamics; no price level named or actionable instruction given.

updates.tweet_text: @ashwagamma About as bad as trading conditions get right now. 1/10 conditions

updates.tweet_text: @MtBornKidd More or less! At least until volatility comes back. Nice little bearish H&S here so if we luck out and it triggers down we may get a window of more setups
updates.notes: Conversational reply referencing a bearish H&S pattern with no explicit actionable price named; no trigger price, entry, or level identified.

updates.tweet_text: @JackRFrankII Yes valid entry, still active now as the low hasn't lost. No volatility now though + summer trading + mid day chop means if you take a trade need to be ready to sit for hours and hours
updates.notes: Pure trade management/advisory reply to user — no price named, no actionable level introduced.

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: Another day of untradable summer chop. If some volatility can appear 7570 recoveries with speed and momentum are actionable. Otherwise,  nothing until 7553 traps. Newsletter out soon with next entries
updates.notes: 7570 and 7553 are both morning-plan levels; tweet is a closing commentary/reaffirmation with no newly named actionable prices.
